notes: Antipater, a Macedonian general and regent, known for his political and military role in the late 4th century BCE.

docs.title: Life of Phocion
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … power, which he exercised, as a cruel master and despot, to distress those under his command. Yet Phocion had interest with him to recall many from banishment by his intercession, and prevailed also for those who were driven out, that they might not, like others, be hurried beyond
